Sec. 1  
Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major city in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and cultural significance. It is one of the largest urban centers in the country and serves as a hub for business and education. The city is home to several universities and institutions that contribute to its development. Lekki is also a center for innovation and entrepreneurship, attracting many businesses and startups. The city is strategically located and has a well-developed infrastructure, making it an attractive place for both residents and investors.
